Transportation project

Enhancing Access, Safety, and Connectivity at Transit Hubs

Embedded GIS and planning work focused on access, safety, and connectivity at transit hubs.

Transportation and planning work sharpened how I think about public constraints, operating trade-offs, and the difference between technically possible solutions and the ones people can actually use.

If the embed does not load, open the StoryMap directly.

Edwin Tse

I build data systems and reporting workflows that make day-to-day work easier to read, trust, and use.

Outside work I keep coming back to transit systems, public infrastructure, fairness questions, and small automation tools that remove repeat friction.
